transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Thanks for calling Meridian Health Navigator. How can I help you today?

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: Hi, I need a referral to see a dermatologist. My doctor said I need one from my primary care plan.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: I can help with that. Can I get your member ID number, please?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Got it, I have you as member R-2 2 8 4 9 6 7. Can you confirm your date of birth?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Great, I see your primary care physician is Dr. Halvorsen. I'm processing a referral to Dr. Chen, dermatology, under your Silver Advantage plan.

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: Okay, how long will that take to go through?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Referrals typically process within two to three business days. You'll get a confirmation text once it's approved.

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: Okay. And do I need to call the dermatologist's office myself to schedule?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Yes, once you get the approval text, just call their office directly and reference the referral number in the message.

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: Got it, thank you for your help.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: You're welcome. Have a great day.
